contents.value: **@model** — Razor keyword.
**@page** — Razor keyword.
**@section** — Razor keyword.
**@using** — Razor keyword.
**@inject** — Razor keyword.
**Html.Raw** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.Partial** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.RenderPartial** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.ActionLink** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.BeginForm** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
A **class** is a reference type that encapsulates data and behavior.
A **struct** is a value type suitable for small data structures.
An **interface** defines a contract that implementing types must follow.

A **delegate** is a type-safe function pointer.
```csharp
delegate void Handler(string msg);
```
An **event** enables a class to notify subscribers when something occurs.
**async** marks a method as asynchronous, allowing use of **await**.
**await** suspends execution until an asynchronous operation completes.

**LINQ** provides query syntax for collections.
```csharp
var result = from x in list where x > 0 select x;
```

A **property** provides controlled access to a field.
```csharp
public int Age { get; set; }
```
A **namespace** organizes types and prevents naming conflicts.

**Nullable types** can represent the normal range of values plus null.
```csharp
int? x = null; string? s = null;
```

A **record** is an immutable reference type with value-based equality.
```csharp
record Person(string Name, int Age);
```

**Generics** create type-safe reusable components.
```csharp
public class Box<T> { public T Value { get; set; } }
```
